_note: Round 2 #3: {@html EXPR} now type-checks the expression. Pre-2026-04-26 the directive was a no-op in our emit, so typos like `undefinedTypo` silently passed. Code 2552 (vs the bare 2304) fires here because tsgo recognises `undefined` as a similar global and offers it as a suggestion. Positions are LSP-style 0-based.
